data.body: Docs oracle RED-first: new tests/scripts/test_metrics_docs.py::test_metrics_surface_documented fails at the intended missing [metrics] prerequisite in docs/reuse-surface.md. Contract card: authoritative sources are pyproject.toml metrics extra, CodeHealthConfig defaults/coercers, analyzer modules, and registry Unavailable behavior; tier=scripts docs guard because exact adoption/config surface is textual. Full config/default and user-guide fallback assertions are physically held out. Dispatched standard-tier docs implementer; visible happy path covers reuse-surface prerequisites.
